metadata.description: Sidekick — AI coding agents as Claude sidekicks. Forge, Kay, and Codex are the current sidekicks: Forge and Kay can be installed/configured through Sidekick, while Codex delegates to the local OpenAI Codex CLI.

plugins.name: sidekick
plugins.description: Sidekick — a collection of AI coding agents as Claude sidekicks. Forge, Kay, and Codex are the current sidekicks: Forge and Kay can be installed/configured through Sidekick, while Codex delegates to the local OpenAI Codex CLI and keeps Claude in the orchestrator role.
